case_title: MEI FANG LISA ZHANG VS. NANCY JEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MARIAN KONG AND BRANDON CHEN INTERPRETER ENGLISH/MANDARIN - MANDARIN/ENGLISH RESPECTIVELY ON BEHALF OF THE PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, MEI FANG LISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JEN, NANCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
